task_completion.description: Set the new item type to Encyclopedia Article
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Jurism right-hand info pane, the 'Item Type' dropdown or field should display 'Encyclopedia Article'.

task_completion.description: Enter the requested Title and Author
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Title' field should contain 'Adverse Possession' and the 'Author' field should contain 'Smith, John' or 'John Smith'.

task_completion.description: Enter the Encyclopedia Title, Series, and Volume
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Encyclopedia Title' field should contain 'American Jurisprudence', the 'Series' field should contain '2d', and the 'Volume' field should contain '3'.

task_completion.description: Enter the Publisher, Date, and Pages
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Publisher' field should contain 'West', the 'Date' field should contain '2023', and the 'Pages' field should contain '120-145'.

task_completion.description: The completed reference is saved and visible in the Jurism library
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main middle pane of the Jurism library shows a row for 'Adverse Possession' by 'Smith', indicating the item was successfully created and saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jurism graphical user interface to create the item
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Jurism application window with its standard menus, toolbars, and panes being actively used, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the metadata into a text editor or generic document
integrity.visual_evidence: The metadata must be entered into the specific fields of the Jurism 'Info' pane, not a notepad, word processor, or web browser.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the data rather than using an automated import script
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the progression of fields being filled out in the Jurism item pane.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires the agent to enter specific synthetic data into Jurism. Verify the agent entered the exact requested metadata: Title ('Adverse Possession'), Author ('John Smith'), Encyclopedia Title ('American Jurisprudence'), Series ('2d'), Volume ('3'), Publisher ('West'), Date ('2023'), and Pages ('120-145'). Note that while 'Adverse Possession' is a real topic in Volume 3 of American Jurisprudence 2d published by West, the author 'John Smith' and pages '120-145' are synthetic data specific to this task and must be entered exactly as requested, overriding real-world facts.
